title: iPhongelion An Evangelion phone customization thread
display_title: iPhongelion An Evangelion phone customization thread
wikitext:
[]: iPhongelion (An Evangelion phone customization thread)             Quote Post by Jomei » Sat Jan 26, 2013 1:26 pm I apologize if there's a pre-existing thread, but I don't see one after going back several pages. Post and discuss your various Evangelion-themed iPhone (or other whatever other phone) customizations! Do you have phone cases? Ringtones? Wallpapers? Themes? Apps or games? Tell us about them! Right now I have a King Ghidorah ringtone, which IIRC Misato also uses in the Rebuild movies (an allusion to the phones in Ultraman, which use the same monster sound). I am looking for some great images for wallpapers, though, so if anyone has some to share... please do!

[]:             Quote Post by ungenesis » Fri Feb 08, 2013 4:29 pm When I had a Google G1 phone, I used this as my wallpaper: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 08, 2013 6:15 pm Related Mr. Tines wrote: Hello Kitty x Evangelion iPhone accessories .

[]:             Quote Post by Jomei » Fri Feb 08, 2013 6:19 pm Recently I downloaded this bizarre navigator app that has Mari serve as your guide through San Francisco, complete with an English voice actress. No clue if it's the one from the dub, though.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Feb 08, 2013 6:24 pm I used that a couple of times when I visited SF recently (it's only available in the US store, so it was a bit of a pain working out a way to download it with a UK Apple account). I understand it to be the real voice.

Article: iPhongelion An Evangelion phone customization thread
[]: iPhongelion (An Evangelion phone customization thread)             Quote Post by Jomei » Sat Jan 26, 2013 1:26 pm I apologize if there's a pre-existing thread, but I don't see one after going back several pages. Post and discuss your various Evangelion-themed iPhone (or other whatever other phone) customizations! Do you have phone cases? Ringtones? Wallpapers? Themes? Apps or games? Tell us about them! Right now I have a King Ghidorah ringtone, which IIRC Misato also uses in the Rebuild movies (an allusion to the phones in Ultraman, which use the same monster sound). I am looking for some great images for wallpapers, though, so if anyone has some to share... please do!
